negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_problem
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,negated_conjecture,
    ~grew_up_in_health_home(taylor)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~disregard_physical_well_being(taylor)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~grew_up_in_health_home(X0) | eats_salads_regularly(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~eats_salads_regularly(X0) | very_conscious(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~disregard_physical_well_being(X0) | ~very_conscious(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.

    define fulfills_daily_nutritional_intakes(X0) := $false
